_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: after 12 weeks of daily cabozantinib treatment, the number of PN per mouse was reduced by approximately 60% with normalization of nerve microarchitecture
details: After 12 weeks of daily cabozantinib treatment, the number of PN per mouse was reduced by approximately 60% with normalization of nerve microarchitecture
